parameters.jsCode: const meta=$items('Parse Chat Command')[0].json;const origin=meta.origin;const robotsStr=(()=>{const j=$input.first().json;for(const v of Object.values(j)){if(typeof v==='string'&&v.length>0)return v;}return '';})();const lines=robotsStr.split('\n');const found=[];for(const line of lines){const low=line.toLowerCase();const idx=low.indexOf('sitemap:');if(idx!==-1){const u=line.slice(idx+8).trim();if(u)found.push(u.split(/\s+/)[0]);}}const defaults=[origin+'/sitemap.xml',origin+'/sitemap_index.xml',origin+'/sitemap-index.xml',origin+'/sitemapindex.xml',origin+'/wp-sitemap.xml',origin+'/sitemap.xml.gz'];const html=[origin+'/sitemap',origin+'/en/sitemap',origin+'/es/sitemap',origin+'/de/sitemap',origin+'/sitemap/'];const candidates=[...found,...defaults,...html].filter(Boolean);const uniq=[...new Set(candidates)];return uniq.map(u=>({json:{candidateUrl:u}}));

const meta=$items('Parse Chat Command')[0].json;const origin=meta.origin;const host=(new URL(origin)).host;const all=$input.all().map(x=>x.json);function getBody(o){for(const k of ['body','data','response','text']){if(typeof o[k]==='string')return o[k];}for(const v of Object.values(o)){if(typeof v==='string'&&v.length>50)return v;}return '';}let bestScore=0;let bestBody='';for(const o of all){const body=getBody(o)||'';if(!body)continue;const b=body.toLowerCase();let score=0;if(b.includes('<urlset'))score=3;else if(b.includes('<sitemapindex'))score=2;else if(b.includes('<html'))score=1;if(score>bestScore){bestScore=score;bestBody=body;}}let pageUrls=[];let childSitemaps=[];if(bestScore===3||bestScore===2){const locRe=new RegExp('<loc>([^<]+)</loc>','gi');for(const m of bestBody.matchAll(locRe)){const u=(m[1]||'').trim();if(!u)continue;const lu=u.toLowerCase();const isXml=lu.endsWith('.xml')||lu.endsWith('.xml.gz');if(bestScore===2&&isXml)childSitemaps.push(u);else pageUrls.push(u);} } else if(bestScore===1){const hrefRe=/href=["']([^"']+)["']/gi;for(const m of bestBody.matchAll(hrefRe)){const h=(m[1]||'').trim();if(!h||h.startsWith('#')||h.startsWith('mailto:')||h.startsWith('tel:')||h.startsWith('javascript:'))continue;try{const u=new URL(h,origin);if(u.host!==host)continue;pageUrls.push(u.href);}catch(e){}}}pageUrls=[...new Set(pageUrls)];childSitemaps=[...new Set(childSitemaps)];if(pageUrls.length===0)pageUrls=[''];if(childSitemaps.length===0)childSitemaps=[''];const out=[];for(const u of pageUrls){out.push({json:{kind:'pageUrl',url:u,isDummy:!u}});}for(const u of childSitemaps){out.push({json:{kind:'childSitemap',url:u,isDummy:!u}});}return out;

const meta=$items('Parse Chat Command')[0].json;const origin=meta.origin;const host=(new URL(origin)).host;const all=$input.all().map(i=>i.json);function getBody(o){for(const k of ['body','data','response','text']){if(typeof o[k]==='string')return o[k];}for(const v of Object.values(o)){if(typeof v==='string'&&v.length>50)return v;}return '';}const pageUrls=[];const locRe=new RegExp('<loc>([^<]+)</loc>','gi');for(const o of all){const body=getBody(o)||'';if(!body)continue;for(const m of body.matchAll(locRe)){const u=(m[1]||'').trim();if(!u)continue;const lu=u.toLowerCase();const isXml=lu.endsWith('.xml')||lu.endsWith('.xml.gz');if(isXml)continue;try{const uu=new URL(u,origin);if(uu.host!==host)continue;pageUrls.push(uu.href);}catch(e){}}}const uniq=[...new Set(pageUrls)];if(uniq.length===0)return [{json:{kind:'pageUrl',url:'',isDummy:true}}];return uniq.map(u=>({json:{kind:'pageUrl',url:u,isDummy:false}}));

const meta=$items('Parse Chat Command')[0].json;const origin=meta.origin;const host=(new URL(origin)).host;const max=meta.maxProducts||200;const urls=[];for(const it of $input.all()){const j=it.json;if(j.kind==='pageUrl'&&j.url)urls.push(j.url);}const ded=[...new Set(urls)];const cleaned=[];const badExt=['.jpg','.jpeg','.png','.gif','.webp','.svg','.css','.js','.pdf','.zip','.rar','.7z','.mp4','.mp3','.wav','.ico','.woff','.woff2','.ttf','.eot'];for(const u of ded){try{const uu=new URL(u);if(uu.host!==host)continue;const p=uu.pathname.toLowerCase();if(badExt.some(ext=>p.endsWith(ext)))continue;cleaned.push(uu.href);}catch(e){}}const productHints=['/product/','/products/','/producto/','/productos/','/shop/','/store/','/tienda/','/catalog','/catalogo','/item/','/p/','/prod'];const hinted=cleaned.filter(u=>productHints.some(h=>u.toLowerCase().includes(h)));const chosen=(hinted.length>=Math.min(50,max))?hinted:cleaned;const final=chosen.slice(0,max);if(final.length===0)return [{json:{noUrls:true}}];return final.map(u=>({json:{url:u}}));

const meta=$items('Parse Chat Command')[0].json;const origin=meta.origin;function getBody(o){for(const k of ['body','data','response','text']){if(typeof o[k]==='string')return o[k];}for(const v of Object.values(o)){if(typeof v==='string'&&v.length>50)return v;}return '';}function stripTags(s){return String(s||'').replace(/<[^>]+>/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();}function typeHas(t,val){if(!t)return false;if(Array.isArray(t))return t.map(x=>String(x)).some(x=>x===val||x.includes(val));const s=String(t);return s===val||s.includes(val);}const items=$input.all();const out=[];for(const it of items){const j=it.json||{};const url=j.url||j.candidateUrl||j.link||'';const html=getBody(j)||'';if(!url||!html||html.length<200){out.push({json:{url,isProduct:false}});continue;}const re=new RegExp('<script[^>]*application/ld\\+json[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</script>','gi');const scripts=[];let m;while((m=re.exec(html))!==null){scripts.push((m[1]||'').trim());}const objs=[];for(const s of scripts){if(!s)continue;try{const parsed=JSON.parse(s);const arr=Array.isArray(parsed)?parsed:[parsed];for(const o of arr){if(o&&typeof o==='object'){if(Array.isArray(o['@graph'])){for(const g of o['@graph'])objs.push(g);}objs.push(o);}}}catch(e){}}let prod=null;for(const o of objs){if(o&&typeHas(o['@type'],'Product')){prod=o;break;}}let bc=null;for(const o of objs){if(o&&typeHas(o['@type'],'BreadcrumbList')){bc=o;break;}}let name=(prod&&prod.name)?String(prod.name).trim():'';if(!name){const titleMatch=html.match(new RegExp('<title[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</title>','i'));if(titleMatch)name=stripTags(titleMatch[1]).split('|')[0].split('-')[0].trim();}let price=null;let currency=null;if(prod&&prod.offers){const off=Array.isArray(prod.offers)?prod.offers[0]:prod.offers;currency=off&&off.priceCurrency?String(off.priceCurrency):null;let pr=null;if(off){pr=off.price??(off.priceSpecification&&off.priceSpecification.price)??null;}if(pr!=null){const s=String(pr).replace(',','.').replace(/[^0-9.]/g,'');const n=parseFloat(s);if(Number.isFinite(n))price=n;}}let categoryPath='';if(bc&&bc.itemListElement){const els=Array.isArray(bc.itemListElement)?bc.itemListElement:[bc.itemListElement];const names=[];for(const el of els){const item=el&&el.item?el.item:el;const nm=(item&&item.name)?item.name:(el&&el.name)?el.name:'';if(nm)names.push(String(nm).trim());}const cleaned=names.filter(x=>x&&x.toLowerCase()!=='home'&&x.toLowerCase()!=='inicio');if(cleaned.length>0){let last=cleaned[cleaned.length-1];if(name&&last&&last.toLowerCase()===name.toLowerCase())cleaned.pop();categoryPath=cleaned.join(' > ');}}if(!categoryPath){try{const p=new URL(url).pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);const seg=p.slice(0,Math.max(1,Math.min(3,p.length-1)));categoryPath=seg.map(s=>decodeURIComponent(s)).join(' > ');}catch(e){categoryPath='';}}let sku='';const itemNo=html.match(/Item\s*No\.?\s*[:\-]?\s*([A-Z0-9\-_.]+)/i);if(itemNo)sku=String(itemNo[1]).trim();const isProduct=!!prod||!!(name&&price!==null);out.push({json:{url,isProduct,name,price,currency,category:categoryPath||'Sin categoria',sku}});}return out;

const meta=$items('Parse Chat Command')[0].json;const chatId=meta.chatId;const src=meta.targetUrl;const now=new Date().toISOString();const items=$input.all().map(i=>i.json||{});const products=items.filter(p=>p.isProduct&&p.name).map(p=>({name:p.name,price:(p.price??null),currency:(p.currency??null),url:p.url,sku:(p.sku||null)}));const byCat=new Map();for(const p of items){if(!(p.isProduct&&p.name))continue;const c=(p.category||'Sin categoria').trim()||'Sin categoria';if(!byCat.has(c))byCat.set(c,[]);byCat.get(c).push({name:p.name,price:(p.price??null),currency:(p.currency??null),url:p.url,sku:(p.sku||null)});}const categories=[...byCat.entries()].sort((a,b)=>a[0].localeCompare(b[0])).map(([name,prods])=>({name,products:prods}));const catalog={source:src,generated_at:now,total_products:products.length,categories};const jsonStr=JSON.stringify(catalog,null,2);const host=(new URL(meta.origin)).host.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9.-]/g,'_');const fileName=`catalog_${host}_${Date.now()}.json`;return [{json:{chatId,fileName,total_products:products.length},binary:{data:{data:Buffer.from(jsonStr,'utf8').toString('base64'),mimeType:'application/json',fileName}}}];
